title: avenula versicolor
intro: Avenula versicolor, also known as the lesser meadow-rue, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Ranunculaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Avenula versicolor include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems and alleviate pain. Avenula versicolor can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusions, and is often used in herbal medicine to support respiratory and digestive health.
